geography.data_source: KMC (Kolkata Municipal Corporation) ward map 2022, CBD boundary delineation from KMDA master plan

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Kolkata district tables, BBD Bagh area ward-level data, estimated decline at -0.3% CAGR (old city population declining)

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) West Bengal urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, BBD Bagh (Dalhousie Square) government/commercial employment mix

commute_profile.data_source: Kolkata Metro Railway ridership 2023, CSTC/NBSTC bus data, CTC tram route data, CMP Kolkata 2008 mode share adjusted for metro expansion

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from transit hub + government zone hybrid, very high political mobilisation (Bengal has highest protest culture), Lokniti-CSDS 2024 West Bengal data, adda culture information diffusion

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from CBD mixing patterns, high cross-income bridging in commercial zone, strong para (neighbourhood) culture even in commercial area, very high tier2 density due to political organisation

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from New Market (Hogg Market) footfall data, KMC market survey, one of Kolkata's largest traditional markets
Sealdah station daily passenger count (Eastern Railway) — among India's busiest, station area vendor estimates
Estimated from College Street book market and university cluster footfall, Presidency/Calcutta University area
Estimated from Burrabazar/Bara Bazaar wholesale trading activity, KMC commercial zone survey, one of Asia's oldest wholesale markets

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Hybrid Transit Hub/Mixed + Government Zone template for BBD Bagh's dual character as Kolkata CBD — government headquarters (Writers' Building) + wholesale trade hub (Burrabazar)

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from KMC ward councillor count, Eastern Railway zonal office, strong union presence, vibrant media presence (Kolkata is a major media center)
